messages.text: my bad, the pink sports bra introduced us already
she said you only entertain certified trouble tho
she said u look unaccredited trouble at best
that is wild from someone interviewing the camera
i was bored in traffic, relax investigator 😳
you are loud, make it count
cool, ill be the chaos, you be the judge
u not surviving my courtroom, trust
ill bring snacks for the jury, they love me
jury allergic to cornball behavior, sorry
wednesday night, 8, milkshakes and your scary cross exam
who said i drink milkshakes for strangers
